prose:
**Fukui reactivity indices** — DFT, tier standard (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, density-fitting RI-JK) in PySCF (via chemkit), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied phenol.xyz (single-point at that geometry, not re-optimized). Mulliken-based f(+) and f(–) were computed by performing one-electron removals (N–1) and additions (N+1) at the reference geometry. SCF converged; integrity status OK (trustworthy: true). No warnings reported.

Results (atom labels 1–13; atom order as in input file):
• fukui_plus (f⁺): [–0.99513676, 0.39933187, 2.1028319, 1.6196805, –0.34200646, –0.28910825, 1.3079753, –0.73391778, –0.27465615, –0.91706058, –0.62991625, –0.29591676, 0.047899329]  
• fukui_minus (f⁻): [0.16201477, 0.048772551, 0.070972379, 0.070498539, 0.026704972, 0.020949414, 0.12351549, 0.082321145, 0.088147788, 0.081105985, 0.080487046, 0.09349577, 0.051014152]

• Dual descriptor (f⁺–f⁻): [–1.1571515, 0.35055932, 2.0318596, 1.549182, –0.36871143, –0.31005766, 1.1844598, –0.81623893, –0.36280393, –0.99816657, –0.7104033, –0.38941253, –0.0031148232]

Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O) with f⁻ = 0.16201477
